title: V's Utility Pack
description: A 1.21.10 Modpack featuring many performance and utility mods
body:
A Performance and Utility focused Modpack for version 1.21.10 featuring utility mods like:

- Essentials Mod
- Xaero's World-/Minimap
- Client sort
- Better Tab
- Nbt Copy
- Jade
- Capes
and Many more

With Vanilamas Utility Pack you'll get top performance and essenials on 1.21.10
